Title: HS_Resolve
Description: Returns URL that represents the given DOI
Returns URL that represents the given DOI. The function is installed from the hslookup plugin which uses http://www.handle.net/.

Note that you need to have in your Virtuoso database ini file
in section Plugins added the hslookup.dll file, which location should be in the plugins folder under your
Virtuoso server installation. For ex:
Examples:
SQL> select HS_Resolve('10.1038/35057062');
callret
VARCHAR
http://www.nature.com/doifinder/10.1038/35057062
1 Rows. -- 22 msec.
